calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Off Calendar

Amended Request For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

R. Michael Lieberman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DEMETRICA HOLMES.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) FLOYD BODDEN, and ANNA BODDEN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Demetrica Holmes sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
